cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Anthony could have gone to the amusement park. Let me start by going through each of the given clues and see when Anthony was doing different activities. First, Anthony woke up at 6am. So, before 6am, he was probably asleep. Then, Leslie saw Anthony reading at the library from 6am to 8am. That means Anthony was at the library during those two hours. Next, Jennifer saw him working out at the gym from 8am to 9am.
